notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso doubles (9) on a ground ball to left fielder Kyle Stowers. Taylor Ward scores. Dylan Beavers scores. Pete Alonso to 3rd. Pete Alonso advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by left fielder Kyle Stowers.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Anthony Bender on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Esteury Ruiz steals (3) 3rd base. Owen Caissie steals (2) 2nd base. Throwing error by catcher Samuel Basallo.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill flies out sharply to center fielder Jakob Marsee.

notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman singles on a line drive to left fielder Kyle Stowers. Taylor Ward scores. Pete Alonso to 2nd.
